title: Smoky Flaky Middle Eastern Beef Toast
description: A quick, keto-friendly take on Middle Eastern flavors, featuring seared chuck roast on toasted low‑carb bread, finished with a tangy yogurt drizzle and aromatic spices.
instructions: Slice the chuck roast into 1/2" strips and toss with smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, sumac, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper.
Heat a skillet over medium‑high heat and add the olive oil.
Add the seasoned beef to the skillet and sear for 2–3 minutes per side until a golden crust forms; transfer to a plate.
Toast the low‑carb bread slices in the same skillet or in a toaster until crisp.
Return the skillet to medium heat and briefly reheat the beef in the pan to crisp the edges, about 1 minute.
Spread a thin layer of plain Greek yogurt on each toasted slice.
Top each slice with the seared beef. Optionally, sprinkle a pinch of sumac for extra citrusy flavor.
Serve immediately while the beef is still warm and the toast remains crunchily flaky.
Enjoy this smoky, protein‑packed quick‑fix meal!
